publications.title: Sea-Level Rise Impacts on Coastal Livelihoods in Southern Bangladesh: A Multi-Scenario Analysis
publications.abstract: This study employs ensemble climate models to project sea-level rise scenarios and their cascading impacts on fishing communities across 12 coastal upazilas.

publications.title: Urban Heat Island Dynamics in Dhaka Metropolitan Area Using Landsat-8 Thermal Imagery
publications.abstract: Multi-temporal analysis of surface temperature anomalies across Dhaka's expanding urban fabric reveals critical green infrastructure deficits.

publications.title: Participatory Mapping for Disaster Risk Reduction: Lessons from the Haor Wetlands
publications.abstract: Community-based participatory mapping integrated with satellite-derived flood extent data enables hyperlocal early warning systems in remote wetland areas.

publications.title: Mangrove Biomass Estimation Using SAR and Optical Fusion in the Sundarbans
publications.abstract: A novel fusion methodology combining Sentinel-1 SAR with Sentinel-2 multispectral data achieves 94% accuracy in above-ground biomass estimation.
